# National ID negative corpus
Order number 123456789 (valid AFM-like but no context)
Invoice 100000002 ref
Zip code 12345
Phone 0123456789 (10 digits not 9)
Product 12345678A (8 digits + letter, not NIF format)
Random 99999999X fails NIF check
Model code AB99999Z invalid NINO prefix
Serial BG123456A (invalid NINO prefix)
Lot 1234567890123456 (too long)
SKU 12345678 (8 digits, too short)
Reference ABCDEF (too short)
Tracking 123 (way too short)
Item RSSMRA85T10A562T (wrong check char, CF invalid)
ISBN 978-3-16-148410-0
Postal code 90210
IP address 192168001001 (12 digits)
Date 20240115 (8 digits, too short)
Year 2024 month 01
Time 123456 (6 digits only)
Barcode 1234567890128 (fails AFM/NIF/TFN checks)
